description: Share of St. Paul campus building square footage that is LEED certified
Placed 12 of 81 in waste diversion category
Plan goal to reduce annual carbon emissions by 50% below 2007 emissions by 2024
Plan noted a 37% emissions reduction in the past decade at time of plan publication
Residence halls provide in-room bins and larger waste recovery containers
News article described Pollinator Path as around a dozen sites on the St. Paul campus
